sections.paragraph:
προέρχομαι [πρό, ἔρχομαι] ‘take an advanced position in the course of going’

—a. of proceeding in a direction that lies ahead, go forward Mt 26:39; Mk 14:35; Ac 12:10. Of movement to a position that is in front come in answer 12:13 v.l.

—b. w. focus on being a leader in forward movement go before Lk 22:47.

—c. w. focus on having the advantage over another in forward movement go ahead Mk 6:33; Lk 1:17; Ac 20:5, 13; 2 Cor 9:5.
